title: Race Day Warm-Up (Road Race)
description: Optimal activation before mass-start road race
purpose: Optimal activation before mass-start road race

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 65%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 65% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 65%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 65% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is easy because it's supposed to be. Don't make it harder. 75% FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 75% for 2:00. Where mitochondria multiply and aerobic capacity expands.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 5 minutes of base work done. This feels easy — that's exactly the point. Patience builds power.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 5 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Zone 2 endurance. 75% FTP, 90-95 rpm. Sustainable all day.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/6. 1:00 at 85%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/5. 85% FTP, Seated. 1:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 2/6. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 4 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/6. 85% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/6. 85% FTP, 90-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 1:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/5. 55% FTP, Seated. 1:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 38% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 38% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 43% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 1min 30s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 43% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 43% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 43% done. 115% for 30s. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 1:30. Then 9min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 4/6. 11 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 10s at 150%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 4/6. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/6. Power: 130-150%, Cadence: 95-100 rpm, Position: Standing. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 54% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 2:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 2:00 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where you earn it. 1 more reps. Your legs are screaming. Good.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 5/6. 30s at 115%. Cadence: 88-95 rpm. Seated. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 5/6. You're building something real here. 1 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 13 minutes in. Your legs filed a complaint. HR says you're the CEO. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 13 minutes in. 115% FTP, 88-95 rpm. This builds your race-winning power.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 66% done. 0 intervals left. 5 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 4min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 66% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Slow down. Yes, slower. 88-95 rpm, Seated. Your aerobic system is thanking you.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 3:00 at 65%. This should feel easy. If breathing hard, you're going too hard.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 65% FTP, 88-95 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 2 minutes to go. Your friends are posting threshold intervals. You're being smart. Or lazy. Both?
coachingNotes.MIXED: 75% complete. 2 minutes left. Let your mind wander. Stay in zone.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 18 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 90% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 80-90 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 90% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 90% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 2:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
